channel.title: aima Blog
channel.description: Simple guides, real insights, and tools built for the future.

item.title: What Are AI Agents? Beginner Guide for 2026
item.description: Learn what AI agents are, how they differ from traditional apps, and why they matter in 2026.

item.title: How AI Assistants Are Replacing Apps (And What It Means for You)
item.description: Discover why AI assistants are replacing standalone apps and what that means for work and productivity.

item.title: Why Your Social Media Posts Get No Views (And How to Fix It)
item.description: Learn the biggest reasons social posts get low views and how to improve reach with data and better structure.

item.title: What Is Agentic AI and Why It Matters for Everyday Work
item.description: Understand agentic AI in simple terms and why assistant-style systems matter.

item.title: Choosing AI Tools That Reduce Work Instead of Adding More Dashboards
item.description: A framework for evaluating AI products based on clarity, trust, and actionability.

item.title: A Simple Weekly Finance Review You Can Run With AI
item.description: Use a practical weekly review to understand spending patterns and better decisions.

item.title: Why Most Budgets Fail and What to Track Instead
item.description: Learn why budgets break down and which signals matter more.

item.title: What Creators Should Measure Before Posting Again
item.description: A practical social media review framework for creators.

item.title: Social Media Analytics That Lead to Action
item.description: Move from passive reporting to insight-led social decisions.

item.title: Designing Safe AI Learning Experiences for Kids
item.description: A practical look at safe AI learning design for children and families.
